title: Sandemania cogniauxii
taxonomy: Sandemania cogniauxii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It belongs to the genus Sandemania, which is a group of flowering plants native to Southeast Asia. The family Gesneriaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that include the African violets and gloxinias. Members of the Gesneriaceae family are known for their showy flowers and often have adapted to grow in shaded, tropical environments. Sandemania cogniauxii is a relatively rare and lesser-known species within this family.
constituents: Sandemania cogniauxii, a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, contains active constituents that are still being researched for their potential medicinal properties.
